/usr/bin/ar qc libveloworld_physics.a CMakeFiles/veloworld_physics.dir/Source/VeloWorld/Physics/ForceModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veloworld_physics.dir/Source/VeloWorld/Physics/RouteProfile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veloworld_physics.dir/Source/VeloWorld/Physics/PhysicsEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veloworld_physics.dir/Source/VeloWorld/Physics/SimulatedTrainer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veloworld_physics.dir/Source/VeloWorld/Trainer/TrainerCalibration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veloworld_physics.dir/Source/VeloWorld/Trainer/TrainerManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veloworld_physics.dir/Source/VeloWorld/Trainer/BLEFTMSDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veloworld_physics.dir/Source/VeloWorld/Trainer/ANTPlusFECDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veloworld_physics.dir/Source/VeloWorld/Trainer/CalibratedTrainer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/veloworld_physics.dir/Source/VeloWorld/Sensors/BLEHRMDriver.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libveloworld_physics.a
